lib.read_scattering_matrix¶

Classes

ScatteringMatrix(geom_file_path, ...)

class lib.read_scattering_matrix.ScatteringMatrix(geom_file_path, data_file_path_name)[source]¶

Bases: object

Parameters:

  • geom_file_path (str)

  • data_file_path_name (numpy.array)

__init__(geom_file_path, data_file_path_name)[source]¶

Has functions to read the geometry files, calculate the q_vector, create a new array and insert the data into new matrix using that information

Parameters:

  • geom_file_path (str) – file with geometry information

  • data_file_path_name (np.array) – numpy array containing all image data

Return type:

None

Calculate vector based on file geometry

Create new array that is correct size for the new image

Entering all the parts of the image data array into a cohesive image
